onERC721Received(address,address,uint256.details: Whenever an {IERC721} `tokenId` token is transferred to this contract via {IERC721-safeTransferFrom} by `operator` from `from`, this function is called. It must return its Solidity selector to confirm the token transfer. If any other value is returned or the interface is not implemented by the recipient, the transfer will be reverted. The selector can be obtained in Solidity with `IERC721Receiver.onERC721Received.selector`.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.tokenId: The Warplet token ID to auction

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

GOBBLED_MINT_FAILED().notice: `AuctionSettled.gobbledTokenId` uses this value when `GobbledWarplets.mint` reverts so settlement still completes.

bid(uint256).notice: Place a bid on the current Warplet auction

getQueuedTokenIds().notice: Full waiting-queue order from head to tail for off-chain / frontend use. O(n) gas.

queueBumpFee().notice: WARPGOBB required to move a queued Warplet to the head via ERC777 `send` + `userData`.

settle().notice: Settle the current auction only while the contract is paused (emergency / migration path).         Does not start the next auction — use `settleCurrentAndCreateNewAuction` when unpaused.

settleCurrentAndCreateNewAuction().notice: Settle the current auction and start the next from the queue (normal user path)

startAuction(uint256).notice: Start a new auction with a gobbled Warplet
